name: Sprint Chipper

movements.notes: to touch an elevated wall target

description: A short chipper of GHD-style sit-ups, heavy snatches, and burpees to an elevated target.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2013/8 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; top 30 men and top 30 women advance to the final
